summary: Resolved the two R4 coordination-state inconsistencies reported by independent QA at edf959d3. model-routing now identifies origin/main e8f0050a and RR0-STATUS-LEDGER-COMPACTION-001 as the integrated baseline with no ready task, while goal-mode, model-routing, and continuation expose only the current RR0 Exit REQUEST_CHANGES_ROUTED_R2 route. The full R0 validation matrix passes, so the systems recommendation remains R0_GATE=PASS pending independent QA acceptance.

decisions.decision: R0_GATE=PASS remains the systems recommendation. Return to the same independent qa_reviewer; do not mark ACCEPTED or CLOSED here.
Corrected only the two QA-reported coordination-state defects: stale model-routing integration fields and stale M7 active route surfaces.
No active_threads, leadership, thread registry, PROJECT_STATUS, route, product, package, test, content, CI, dependency, historical Gate, or R1 task path was modified.

risks.summary: Normal Web/Electron paths still lack authoritative Worker command/query/save/load wiring. This remains an R1 risk and is not hidden or reclassified by the R2 coordination-state repair.
The protected M7 worktree still has 20 retained entries and was verified read-only.

requested_action: Independently re-run the R2 state-consistency and full R0 Gate assertions against the commit bound in this handoff. If accepted, route to Lead for status synchronization; otherwise return exact REQUEST_CHANGES evidence to systems_architect.
